'''wafuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draadsitter|draadsitter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draadsitter|draadsitter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wafuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæfivith|wæfivith]] || [[word:wæfivij|wæfivij]] || [[word:wæfivish|wæfivish]] || [[word:wæfivi|wæfivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wafufuvuth|wafufuvuth]] || [[word:wafufuvuj|wafufuvuj]] || [[word:wafufuvush|wafufuvush]] || [[word:wafufuvu|wafufuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wafuvuth|wafuvuth]] || [[word:wafuvuj|wafuvuj]] || [[word:wafuvush|wafuvush]] || [[word:wafuvu|wafuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wafufvuth|wafufvuth]] || [[word:wafufvuj|wafufvuj]] || [[word:wafufvush|wafufvush]] || [[word:wafufvuf|wafufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wafuvuthu|wafuvuthu]] || [[word:wafuvuju|wafuvuju]] || [[word:wafuvushu|wafuvushu]] || [[word:wafuvuku|wafuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wafuvuth|wafuvuth]] || [[word:wafuvuj|wafuvuj]] || [[word:wafuvush|wafuvush]] || [[word:wafuvu|wafuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wafuvuthul|wafuvuthul]] || [[word:wafuvujul|wafuvujul]] || [[word:wafuvushul|wafuvushul]] || [[word:wafuvukul|wafuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wafuvuthuthu|wafuvuthuthu]] || [[word:wafuvujuju|wafuvujuju]] || [[word:wafuvushushu|wafuvushushu]] || [[word:wafuvuku|wafuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wafuvuthun|wafuvuthun]] || [[word:wafuvujun|wafuvujun]] || [[word:wafuvushun|wafuvushun]] || [[word:wafuvukun|wafuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wafuvuthuoro|wafuvuthuoro]] || [[word:wafuvujuoro|wafuvujuoro]] || [[word:wafuvushuoro|wafuvushuoro]] || [[word:wafuvukuoro|wafuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
